'''Bo-Ro-Tara''' was the [[President/Legends|President]] of [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. President Bo-Ro-Tara was in office when war erupted on his homeworld in a battle that would last for a month. The [[Battle of Cerea]] ended with Bo-Ro-Tara's assassination at the hands of [[Gossam Commandos/Legends|Gossam Commandos]].
